message:
feat(wasm): add web frontend shell for browser dashboard

Create HTML/JS/CSS frontend for the WASM terminal application:

www/index.html:
- Connection status bar with server URL and screen info
- Terminal canvas with loading/error overlays
- Control bar with connect, fullscreen, settings buttons
- Settings modal for WebSocket URL, font size, accessibility
- Debug overlay for performance monitoring

www/style.css:
- Dark theme color palette matching native TUI
- High contrast mode for accessibility (WCAG AA)
- Responsive design for mobile/tablet
- Fullscreen mode with auto-hiding chrome
- Smooth animations for status indicators

www/index.js:
- WASM module initialization (wasm-pack compatible)
- WebSocket connection lifecycle management
- Keyboard input with modifier key support
- Mouse click and resize event handling
- Settings persistence via localStorage
- Render loop with FPS counter

Closes br-2e9jp.4.2: Create Web Frontend Shell

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
